channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Morning Minute: NFTs Storm Back, Led by Bored Apes
item.description: Bitcoin made its highest weekly close since January. Western Union is launching a stablecoin. And NFTs are making a major comeback.

item.title: Kbank teams with Ripple on overseas blockchain remittance trial
item.description: Kbank partnered with Ripple to test blockchain-based overseas remittances as South Korean companies prepare for new stablecoin and digital asset rules.

item.title: France Charges 88, Including Minors, in Crypto ‘Wrench Attack’ Crackdown
item.description: France has recorded 135 crypto-linked incidents since 2023, amid a nationwide surge in so-called “wrench attacks."

item.title: MiCA-licensed Banking Circle joins bank stablecoin settlement race in Europe
item.description: Banking Circle's stablecoin settlement launch follows its CASP approval, entering a crowded market with SocGen, Sygnum and a 12-bank euro stablecoin consortium.

item.title: Bitcoin hits wall at $80,000, one analyst says the pullback is temporary
item.description: What you need to know for April 27, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin leads $1.2B weekly inflows into crypto investment products
item.description: Crypto ETPs see $1.2 billion inflows in fourth straight week as Bitcoin leads gains and blockchain equity ETFs hit record demand, CoinShares reported.

item.title: EU’s largest measures against Russia yet include escalation of crypto sanctions evasion
item.description: The European Union noted that Russia has become increasingly reliant on cryptocurrency to circumvent sanctions.

item.title: Bitcoin reverses from $79,500 as oil surge triggers broader crypto selloff
item.description: BTC fails at $80,000 and drops 2% as rising oil prices weigh on sentiment with altcoins leading losses across a volatile session.

item.title: Western Union to Launch Solana-Based Stablecoin Plus ‘Stable Card’ Next Month
item.description: The USDPT stablecoin launching next month will serve as an alternative to SWIFT for agent settlements rather than consumer transactions.

item.title: MACHI BIG BROTHER IS LONG $86M OF CRYPTO Machi Big Brother is now long $44.2M of BTC and $41.8M ETH on-chain. Machi lost $73.44M in the last 6 months trading crypto. Can he make it back? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5RdzZwc214b25zTXNENzJObG95MEc1eF81a3F4NE5XWVZCRkt5QmsyWVl5ZnBiZjExX3lEcjFwUU5XMndjSUZrbDQySFlUT2dJeUktLVZ1MlUxV0k?oc=5" target="_blank">MACHI BIG BROTHER IS LONG $86M OF CRYPTO Ma…

item.title: Global interest rates, Robinhood, Galaxy earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 27.

item.title: 88 people charged over 12 crypto wrench attacks in France
item.description: French law enforcement agencies have been investigating wrench attacks and found that some of the alleged offenders were involved in multiple incidents

item.title: Prediction markets reflect 'wisdom of an informed minority,’ not crowd: Study
item.description: About 3.5% of informed traders, including market makers and skilled takers, capture over 30% of profits on prediction platforms, while about 67% of users absorb the entirety of losses.

item.title: A long-time developer wants to split Bitcoin blockchain and reassign Satoshi coins. The community is calling it a theft
item.description: Paul Sztorc proposes a 2026 hard fork of Bitcoin called eCash, giving BTC holders equivalent tokens and adding Drivechains.

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Over $71M in crypto positions were liquidated in just 60 minutes, with $69.17M in longs wiped out as BTC fell back below $77K. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE56elBtMlB6eFQwMVZHUFpCWUJSMGlVTkQ0SFB4TXVESU93aGhWZWg2c2I2dENmbjd3LUFqRDZkRjJzUHBnbUg5U2ZCbS1yVTdOSXZpRlN1SUNraEt2T0FnMlFVZ1Y?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Over $71M in crypto pos…

item.title: Pudgy Penguins, BAYC rally masks a shrinking NFT market as volumes and users fall
item.description: The two blue-chip collections are leading double-digit gains as global NFT sales volume falls and participation hits multi-year lows.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls back from 12-week high as Iran rally hits seller wall at $79,400
Western Union eyes May for its stablecoin USDPT rollout
item.description: Western Union CEO Devin McGranahan said the company will focus on expanding adoption and embedding digital assets into its core money movement platform going forward.

item.title: Aave asks Arbitrum to send 30K ETH from Kelp exploiter to ‘DeFi United’
item.description: More than $21 million in contributions has been made to the "DeFi United" relief effort so far, with another $215 million to be potentially allocated if certain governance proposals succeed.

item.title: Western Union to Launch Solana-Based Stablecoin USDPT Next Month Traditional cross-border remittance giant Western Union’s CEO and President Devin McGranahan said its Solana-based, U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin USDPT is in the final stages of pre - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9ucV9kRXlodkJ5N3o4TmdveGVSSXZGb0Y3UXFKMEg3cGNsaDliSk5Ja3BLR1RaYVdTbFc0MWlndUlMQUR0QndIdnJCa0JqNFJYREQyYVNmYUY1MUN6MFljVXduWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Western Union to Launch Solana-B…

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Polymarket traders give Bitcoin a 73% chance of hitting $80,000 before the end of April, up 60% from earlier this month. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBNQlg2QzZhRTBpOWJGeEtTczBuYlpVZC1Day1ZR1B2SFEzdFM2V2sxUmxuOWt0X1l5R1Q4RHpnclJuRXhnbkRrLXJnV0xEaEMtdWp5SzFNT2kwQkNlWm1PeTZLaFA?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Polymarket traders give…

item.title: Plenty of crypto newbies lost money chasing the bitcoin boom that followed Donald Trump’s reelection. None of them took as big of a hit as the president himself. Get a full breakdown of how the Trumps blew $1 billion on Bitcoin: forbes.com/sites/danalexa… (P - x.com

item.title: 'Historical average' could push Bitcoin bottom at $57K level: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin was “rejected” from the $80,000 price level, which is its next resistance zone on the way to reclaiming the $100,000 psychological price level.

item.title: JUST IN: Giant BTC logo and Bitcoin treasury company Metplanet spotted on the Las Vegas Sphere 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5lZzU2ZF9GWUNKY1Y2MWpKZDV2TUVmb3NqRzlsYXFnMVV5dWV6cGpyVVBJWG81X21yWkJEOWd6QXpYSm81ckVXemlPNTNhNTdIMXNjU3Y2Z1RXcXFPTVFiSW5yUkxzSDA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Giant BTC logo and…

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor again hints at impending BTC purchase
item.description: The biggest Bitcoin treasury company's data shows holdings are profitable, having gained about 3.3% amid Bitcoin's rally to about $78,000.

item.title: Coachella Uses Google DeepMind AI to Test the Future of Live Entertainment
item.description: Coachella is experimenting with AI-built artist tools, immersive digital worlds, and 3D performance archives that could shape future fan experiences.

item.title: Running out of time on Clarity: State of Crypto
item.description: April is almost over. May is the month to watch.

item.title: Litecoin gives post-attack update, but other devs doubt zero-day theory
item.description: Valid transactions that occurred during the affected blocks were not impacted and remain on the main chain, the Litecoin development team said.

item.title: Aave raises nearly 80% of the $200 million it needs to cover bad debt left by Kelp DAO exploit
item.description: Blockchain analytics platform Arkham said that the largest contributors are Mantle and Aave DAO, having raised a combined $127 million.

item.title: Why DeFi isn't dead despite massive exploits and $13 billion investor exodus
item.description: A $292 million exploit and $13 billion TVL drop looks catastrophic on the surface, but the data tells a different story.

item.title: Less Than 10% of World Owns Crypto, Fueling Early Adopter Optimism - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE1fcDNCWXhhQm1MdG4tVnBLSXZKbzJtU2xHekhoRGRXcTZXeUhobDZUamdDSTJEa082cTg0Qmp1bUV6cEFybnNfaEZpX3QxVjJmSldEM1NIaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Less Than 10% of World Owns Crypto, Fueling Earl…

item.title: ''Nobody is using Bitcoin'' - x.com
item.description: ''Nobody is using Bitcoin''

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at Strategy buying more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1sX2ctN3c2cWFHQmo0RVI2TUE0bjdSVUJxLUh4aFRHUE9ra1FHWXhuNy03TUU0WDAtOWZOU2NWZWZxbTkwZUVOczlNX1JFVjdtVWJPb2RoUHU3Z1BHNDRMM1lmZzV5aXM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: Bitcoin whales build long positions as funding stays deeply negative
item.description: Long bias from the largest perpetual traders on Hyperliquid has built steadily through February, March and April, with the position now leaning aggressively long as bitcoin tags $80,000 and US-Iran talks resume.

item.title: Freezing 5.6 million dormant bitcoin could trigger ‘worst’ single-day repricing
item.description: Maximalists warn freezing 5.6M BTC risks instant sell-offs, while others say quantum threats leave no alternative.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "The ₿eat Goes On." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE14akoydXpSaEgwYlZwOTVQWDd1QU9Kdi13NldEOFpGaWJ4aFhnM1J4cnBGeE1XMGpWaXRCZkVfUlJNQTlJLTBkMV83cFpKX3JBTTVBaUFPZHFLQW1ubEwtNG93?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Market conditions force 1 in 3 crypto traders to cut everyday spending: Survey
item.description: More than a third of US crypto traders report cutting daily expenses and delaying major purchases as unrealized losses weigh on household finances.

item.title: Only 3% of traders drive prediction markets' accuracy, not the crowd, study finds
item.description: Researchers show market accuracy comes from a tiny group of informed traders, not broad participation.

item.title: Your AI Agent Can Now Groan While Untangling Your Vibe Coded Mess
item.description: A new GitHub plugin makes your coding agent emit escalating human moans as it suffers through your spaghetti code.

item.title: MiCA's not enough: Bybit CEO says firms need other licenses to turn a profit in Europe
item.description: In an interview, Ben Zhou said the crypto exchange is at least two years away from breaking even in Europe.

item.title: The most bullish scenario for #Bitcoin would be this breakout to $100K in the coming period. The reason for this is that it invalidates essentially every bearish retest scenario and clearly makes a new higher high. After such a case, you'd be looking for a higher l - x.com

item.title: Coinbase's John D’Agostino says crypto platform stands alone as industry's full-service prime broker
item.description: The exchange’s institutional arm has quietly assembled trading, custody, financing, derivatives and cross margining into a single stack, something its rivals still piece together.

item.title: Mike Novogratz: U.S. CLARITY Act Could Advance in May Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz said the U.S. CLARITY Act will likely be finalized in May and could be signed into law by June, providing clearer regulatory frameworks for the crypto industry and op - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE01SV8tdlBHMndROW85YlhuZHgySllHTmR0SjdlVFZZUHdHRDZMbG55MklteV9xYktiYS04T0RpZXdJbjdycW1JQUVtOEpYQkdPVGM4WnRRWDIwRFBNcjd0THVUQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Mike Novogratz: U.S. CLARITY Act…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation unstakes 17K ETH after nearing 70K staked ETH milestone
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation unstaked over 17,000 ETH worth $40M shortly after approaching its 70,000 ETH staking target.

item.title: Crypto Influencer Says Green Candles Trump Narratives in Memecoin Trading - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5uTXF6b1pDaUJSdHZvNTBzamNJS094dnFpMjVNcWQ1amQ0MzNtR0tUa0dLWFdZRDJfU3VMcGdYWEtvSGNSbENVOVR1OE1IcmJCbFlJeVRpaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Influencer Says Green Candles Trump Narra…

item.title: Trump’s official memecoin extends slide as he hosts exclusive investor gala
item.description: TRUMP memecoin fell nearly 10% in 24 hours despite a Mar-a-Lago investor gala, with the token still down over 96% from its peak.

item.title: Litecoin hit by denial-of-service attack, rewrites 13 blocks to reverse effect
item.description: Litecoin's foundation called the weekend exploit a zero-day. The litecoin-project GitHub repository shows the consensus vulnerability was privately patched between March 19 and 26, more than four weeks before the attack.

item.title: 🇻🇳 VIETNAM TO LAUNCH FIRST-EVER CRYPTO EXCHANGE Vietnam is preparing to launch its first regulated crypto market in Q2 2026 via a 5-year pilot for approved exchanges, per Nikkei. CAEX, backed by OKX Ventures and HashKey Capital, is among t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9sMDlkS0xFYkh2cmM1M0JpM3c5bzFXQVlWWkRDVVNWRmo3d1I3Ykp0enprVFA1WkxGbXRHbjg5ZllKdGlNYkRrUFRfbDlOakJWTlNkeE1CaXpSV0U2NW9HcQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🇻🇳 VIETNAM TO LAUNCH FIRST-EVER CR…

item.title: THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION IS UNSTAKING ETH The Ethereum Foundation is unstaking $48.9M ETH. They just deposited WSTETH to the Lido unstETH contract and will receive unstaked ETH once the unlocking process is completed. Are they going to s - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: $78,000 Bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBfNzFORFpwcVJjejFyNTZxZ1lIWE5iSnp4RVA1d0tWQ3ROUUhmN3FYcTYyQWdmbEd1UlVwbElhb3IyX0VsLXRLQ1luYXExVW5mSzdFOTJRRDZhc2tRRWcwbFVYZVJGTHc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $78,000 Bitcoin 🚀…

item.title: 🇺🇸 PRESIDENT TRUMP: BANKS WON’T DERAIL CLARITY ACT. At a Mar-a-Lago gathering, President Donald Trump said he won’t let banks derail the long-delayed Clarity Act on U.S. crypto market structure. The Crypto President 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE56aE9zYzc1MUxuRXQ5ZmM3WjZfYkVZUWlnMW02UU1UaVNXZDN5RnJaMDQ4cm1obnhBSjlYQmVSYlRQREtFaE95YW9SeFk0cUNpbllKalJ3R2ZJODdNeVh0Qjhn?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 PRESIDENT TRUMP: BANKS WON’T …

item.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
item.description: The group spent tens of millions of dollars on luxury items and real estate, using funds stolen from crypto users in social engineering scams.

item.title: Bitcoiners cast doubt on the US military's understanding of the network
item.description: Bitcoin advocate Matthew Kratter said US Navy Admiral Samuel Paparo's Senate testimony on Tuesday sounded like it was written by an "intern."

item.title: Elon Musk’s Grok Most Likely Among Top AI Models to Reinforce Delusions: Study
item.description: Researchers found that xAI's Grok was the riskiest AI model tested, often validating delusions and offering dangerous advice.

item.title: Crypto is built for AI agents, not humans, says Alchemy's CEO
item.description: Alchemy CEO Nikil Viswanathan argues the global financial system was designed for humans, but the next wave of commerce will be driven by AI agents that operate natively in crypto.

item.title: Trump defends crypto legislation at private event featuring boxer Mike Tyson, Tether CEO
item.description: President Donald Trump, at a Mar-a-Lago gathering of investors in his self-branded memecoin, said crypto is mainstream and banks should back off the industry's bill.

item.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet
item.description: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit on Friday, signaling rapid institutional adoption of regulated crypto derivatives in the U.S.

item.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos model is forcing the crypto industry to rethink everything about security
item.description: DeFi leaders say that AI will arm both attackers and defenders, and widen the gap between projects that prioritize security and those that do not.

item.title: Bitcoin Hit Its Highest Price Since January—Why VanEck Analysts See More Potential Gains
item.description: Bitcoin hash rate recovery and negative funding rates signal potential gains ahead, according to the ETF provider's latest network analysis.
